vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The fix only requires editing /etc/chrony.conf to remove non‑server directives and restarting the chronyd service. This does not affect authentication, boot process, or critical system components, and any misconfiguration would only impact time synchronization, not system access.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of accurate time synchronization affecting logging or time‑sensitive applications
